headline: Mercury Systems Q3 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Mercury Systems (NASDAQ:MRCY) reported third-quarter fiscal 2026 results that exceeded management’s expectations, driven by stronger-than-planned backlog conversion, record bookings, and year-over-year margin expansion. Chairman and CEO Bill Ballhaus said the quarter reflected “strong demand signals
